title: Create: Colored Packages
description: Adds several colored packages from applying dye to Create's "Packager" and "Re-Packager" blocks
body:
Create: Colored Packages expands upon Create's package logistic system by adding dyed package boxes, letting you distribute various colored packages. 

Simply apply the dye of choice to a Packager or Repackager block (like how you would for a belt), and watch it pack your items into neatly colored boxes!
You can revert the Packager back to default by using a water bucket or water bottle on the block.

---

![Colored packages displayed in various colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/146fc2976fe9bfbdb09da0fd844264c53ec56c82.jpeg)
